description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check style that runs on push to all branches except gh-readonly-queue/** and master, on pull requests, and on merge groups. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out the repository with submodules, installs various packages and tools, and then runs a series of style checks including clang-format, fix_style, header guards, languages, dilated images, absolute includes, standard header includes, config variables, shellcheck, log error case, pylint, unused header files, and maps.
